channel.title: Ojisan Romance
channel.description: An AI-narrated audio drama about a professor nearing retirement and his age-gap romances with different women. A new woman appears in every episode.
channel.itunes:author: Ojisan Romance

item.title: The Sound of Scissors, a Quiet Night (Mutsumi Takano, 25, Hairdresser, Slender)
item.description: Female character: Name: Mutsumi Takano Age: 25 Occupation: Hairstylist Hair: Black Figure: Slender Features: Beautiful skin, no makeup Way of Speaking: Reserved, few words Vibe: Elegant Expressions of Affection: Loves to be pampered Romantic Style: Falls in love easily Emotional Side: Shy View on Love: Prone to cheating Status: Single, no boyfriend

item.title: The Other Side of the Virgin Road (Hinata Fujita, 22, Wedding Planner, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Hinata Fujita Age: 22 Occupation: Wedding Planner Hair: Long hair Body Type: Average Traits: Neat and elegant, yet with a gyaru vibe Way of Speaking: Slow and relaxed Vibe: Childlike Expression of Affection: Loves to be pampered Romantic Style: Proactive Emotional Side: Easily embarrassed View on Love: Prone to cheating Status: Married

item.title: The Sound of Scissors, a Drowsy Afternoon (Yuri Kawaguchi, 19, Hairdresser, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Yuri Kawaguchi Age: 19 Occupation: Hairstylist Hair: Black Body Type: Average Features: Beautiful legs, small breasts Way of Speaking: A woman of few words Vibe: Serious Expression of Affection: Romantic Romantic Style: Passionate Emotional Side: Honest View on Love: Attracted to older men Status: Divorced

item.title: A Sandbox Afternoon After the Rain (Reiko Murakami, 25, Nursery Teacher, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Reiko Murakami Age: 25 Occupation: Nursery school teacher Hair: Long Body Type: Average Features: No makeup, beautiful hips Way of Speaking: A woman of few words Vibe: Sensual Expression of Affection: Great at making you feel pampered Romantic Style: Passionate Emotional Side: Prone to loneliness View on Love: Family-oriented Status: Divorced

item.title: Before the Night Deepens (Saaya Ishii, 28, Secretary, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Saaya Ishii Age: 28 Occupation: Secretary Hair: Long Body Type: Average Traits: Fashionable, No makeup Way of Speaking: Slow and relaxed Vibe: A great listener Expression of Affection: Devoted type Romantic Style: Shy and reserved Emotional Side: Full of surprising contrasts View on Love: Family-oriented Status: Single but has a boyfriend

item.title: Slowly, in the Afternoon Light (Ayaka Matsumoto, 27, University Student, Slender)
item.description: Female character: Name: Ayaka Matsumoto Age: 27 Occupation: College student Hair: Long Body type: Slender Features: Fair skin, beautiful hips Way of speaking: Slow and relaxed Vibe: Sociable Love language: Likes to be pampered Romantic style: Passionate Emotional side: Shy View on love: Attracted to older men Status: Divorced

item.title: After the Evening Lecture (Yuna Yamada, 26, Teacher, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Yuina Yamada Age: 26 Occupation: Teacher Hair: Twin tails Body Type: Average Features: Large breasts, droopy eyes Speaking Style: Often polite and formal Vibe: Gentle and kind Expression of Love: Romantic Romantic Style: Experienced Emotional Side: Jealous View on Love: Family-oriented Status: Divorced

item.title: While Cutting Hair (Shizuku Suzuki, 18, Hairdresser, Voluptuous)
item.description: Female character: Name: Shizuku Suzuki Age: 18 Occupation: Hairdresser Hair: Ponytail Body Type: Glamorous (curvy and well-defined) Features: Droopy eyes, neat and elegant Way of Speaking: Soft-spoken, few words Vibe: Childlike Expression of Love: The devoted type Romantic Style: Proactive Emotional Side: Puts on a tough front View on Love: Strong desire for marriage Status: Unmarried, but has a boyfriend

item.title: The Night of the Teacher Training (Hina Tanaka, 22, Teacher, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Haruna Tanaka Age: 22 Occupation: Teacher Hair: Brown Build: Average Features: Petite figure, boyish Way of Speaking: Polite Vibe: Soothing, comforting Expression of Love: Devoted Romantic Style: Skilled at the push-and-pull of romance Emotional Side: Shy, easily embarrassed View on Love: Strong desire for marriage Status: Divorced

item.title: Nocturne, a Single Note (Emi Takahashi, 18, Piano Instructor, Ordinary)
item.description: Female character: Name: Emi Takahashi Age: 18 Occupation: Piano Instructor Hair: Long Body Type: Average Features: Fashionable, beautiful bust Way of Speaking: Reserved, few words Vibe: Serious Expression of Affection: Prefers to be doted on Romantic Style: Cautious (shy in love) Emotional Side: Bashful View on Love: Family-oriented Status: Single, no boyfriend
